title: Deployer AI Risk Register (DARR)
description: An open, citable AI risk register for organizations that deploy AI systems: 82 canonical risks and 61 MITRE ATLAS-anchored sub-risks across seven families, consolidated from the MIT AI Risk Repository and mapped to ISO/IEC 23894 and 42001, MITRE ATLAS, and the EU AI Act, then cross-checked against IBM, Cisco, NIST, and OWASP. Published under CC BY 4.0.
